untranslatable_reason: Pattern recognition conditions (right top below left top, tall and narrow shape, large price variation between tops) cannot be expressed using allowed point-in-time indicators. These require multi-bar pattern detection logic, swing point identification, and geometric analysis not available in the indicator set. The signal requires structural pattern analysis rather than technical indicator thresholds.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture SHORT bias with pivot-based entry and ATR expansion (suggesting volatility/pattern height). Used TRENDING_DOWN and HIGH_VOL regimes to approximate bear market and tall/narrow pattern contexts. Expected decline ranges of -17% to -25% align with typical stop placement 5% above entry for risk/reward. The core pattern geometry and top comparison logic is untranslatable with available indicators.
